message:
refactor(rchd): improve worker selection, health checks, and API robustness

selection.rs (29 lines changed):
  Refine the worker selection algorithm with improved scoring that
  considers recent build throughput and error rates alongside existing
  capacity and latency metrics.

workers.rs (89 lines changed):
  Restructure worker lifecycle management with clearer state transitions
  and more defensive error handling in the worker heartbeat/drain path.
  Reduce unnecessary mutex contention by narrowing critical sections.

health.rs:
  Tighten health endpoint response to include worker-pool utilization
  percentage alongside existing readiness checks.

api.rs:
  Minor API handler adjustments for consistency with updated selection
  and worker types.

ui/workers.rs:
  Update TUI worker display to reflect restructured worker state fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
